text: In this modern, angular space with glass walls and bold signage, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The environment hints at innovation and discovery—evident from the 'R+D' (Research and Development) exhibit inside. I find myself alert and reflective, eager to explore the ideas on display, and marveling at humanity's relentless pursuit of knowledge. The clean, almost clinical surroundings remind me of both the comfort and challenge that come with intellectual exploration.
